description: This generates a lively signed marker-style portrait on a square shikishi board, useful for fan-art autographs, commemorative illustration posts, and personalized thank-you visuals.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 在方形色纸板上生成生动的签名马克笔风格肖像，适用于粉丝艺术签名、纪念插画帖子和个性化感谢视觉内容。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 在方形色紙板上生成生動的簽名麥克筆風格肖像，適用於粉絲藝術簽名、紀念插畫貼文和個人化感謝視覺內容。
description_i18n.ja: 正方形のshikishiボードに生き生きとしたサイン入りマーカースタイルのポートレートを生成。ファンアートのサイン、記念イラスト投稿、パーソナライズされた感謝ビジュアルに最適です。
description_i18n.ko: 정사각형 shikishi 보드에 생동감 있는 사인 마커 스타일 초상화를 생성합니다. 팬아트 사인, 기념 일러스트 게시물, 개인화된 감사 비주얼에 유용합니다.
description_i18n.de: Erzeugt ein lebendiges signiertes Marker-Porträt auf einer quadratischen Shikishi-Tafel, ideal für Fanart-Autogramme, Gedenk-Illustrationen und personalisierte Dankesbilder.
description_i18n.fr: Génère un portrait signé au marqueur vivant sur une planche shikishi carrée, utile pour les autographes de fan-art, les publications d'illustrations commémoratives et les visuels de remerciement personnalisés.
description_i18n.ru: Создаёт живой подписанный портрет в стиле маркера на квадратной доске shikishi, подходит для автографов фан-арта, памятных иллюстраций и персонализированных благодарственных изображений.
description_i18n.es: Genera un retrato vibrante firmado en estilo marcador sobre un tablero shikishi cuadrado, útil para autógrafos de fan-art, ilustraciones conmemorativas y visuales de agradecimiento personalizados.
description_i18n.pt-BR: Gera um retrato vibrante assinado em estilo marcador sobre uma placa shikishi quadrada, útil para autógrafos de fan-art, posts de ilustração comemorativa e visuais de agradecimento personalizados.
description_i18n.it: Genera un vivace ritratto firmato in stile pennarello su una tavola shikishi quadrata, utile per autografi fan-art, post illustrativi commemorativi e visual di ringraziamento personalizzati.
description_i18n.vi: Tạo chân dung ký tên phong cách marker sống động trên bảng shikishi vuông, hữu ích cho chữ ký fan-art, bài đăng minh họa kỷ niệm và hình ảnh cảm ơn cá nhân hóa.
description_i18n.pl: Generuje żywy podpisany portret w stylu markerowym na kwadratowej tablicy shikishi, przydatny do autografów fan-art, pamiątkowych ilustracji i spersonalizowanych podziękowań wizualnych.
description_i18n.id: Menghasilkan potret bergaya marker bertanda tangan yang hidup di papan shikishi persegi, berguna untuk tanda tangan fan-art, postingan ilustrasi peringatan, dan visual ucapan terima kasih yang dipersonalisasi.
description_i18n.nl: Genereert een levendig gesigneerd portret in markerstijl op een vierkant shikishi-bord, handig voor fan-art handtekeningen, herdenkingsillustraties en gepersonaliseerde bedank-visuals.
description_i18n.ar: ينشئ صورة شخصية حيوية موقعة بأسلوب القلم على لوح shikishi مربع، مفيدة لتوقيعات فن المعجبين ومنشورات الرسوم التوضيحية التذكارية والصور المرئية الشخصية للشكر.
description_i18n.tr: Kare shikishi tahtası üzerinde canlı imzalı marker tarzı portre oluşturur, hayran sanatı imzaları, anı illüstrasyonları ve kişiselleştirilmiş teşekkür görselleri için kullanışlıdır.
description_i18n.uk: Створює яскравий підписаний портрет у стилі маркера на квадратній дошці shikishi, корисний для автографів фан-арту, пам'ятних ілюстрацій і персоналізованих подячних зображень.
description_i18n.en: This generates a lively signed marker-style portrait on a square shikishi board, useful for fan-art autographs, commemorative illustration posts, and personalized thank-you visuals.

query.en: A lively hand-drawn fashion portrait in a changed illustration style, made to look like a signed fan-art sketch drawn with markers on a square white shikishi board with a thin gold border. Show a stylish young woman from about the waist up, leaning slightly forward with one elbow resting up near her face in a casual, friendly pose. Her face area is covered by a simple rectangular censor block in a muted beige tone. She has shoulder-length medium brown hair with warm highlights, soft volume, side-swept bangs, and flipped-out ends. Render the art with expressive black ink outlines, visible marker strokes, watercolor-like blending, sketchy hatching, and an energetic, vivid handmade feel. She wears a fitted dark gray ribbed long-sleeve knit top with subtle puffed shoulders, layered delicate gold necklaces, a dangling pearl earring, a beige crossbody bag strap running diagonally across her chest, and a light beige skirt or dress visible at the waist. Leave plenty of clean white background around the figure. Add 2 small sparkle doodles on the left side. Add handwritten Japanese thank-you messages and signature-style black ink writing around the portrait: at upper right write {argument name="top message" default="ありがとう！"} with an underline and a small heart, beneath it place a large stylized autograph reading {argument name="signature name" default="Yui"} with a smiling face mark and a heart, at lower left write {argument name="side message" default="いつも応援してくれてありがとう♡"}, and at lower right write the date {argument name="date" default="2024.5.20"} with another heart. The overall image should feel warm, personal, lively, and like a celebratory signed illustration on a square autograph board.
